# My Villa — Italian Soul, Californian Body

> My Villa designs and builds fire-resilient luxury villas in Los Angeles using Italian architectural principles and reinforced concrete construction.

## About My Villa

My Villa is a luxury residential construction company based in Los Angeles, California. We specialize in designing and building custom villas that combine Italian architectural heritage with California's lifestyle requirements. Our homes are constructed using double-skin precast reinforced concrete — a monolithic building system that provides superior fire resistance, seismic resilience, and thermal performance.

## What We Build

- **Custom luxury villas** in Los Angeles (Pacific Palisades, Beverly Hills, Bel Air, Brentwood, Malibu)
- **Fire-resilient homes** using double-skin precast reinforced concrete (≈250mm wall thickness)
- **Museum-grade fair-faced concrete** finishes with oxide pigments — no paint, no cladding
- **Biophilic architecture** designed around courtyards, natural light, and cross-ventilation
- **Bioclimatic design** by Transsolar KlimaEngineering for passive climate comfort

## Villa Collection

- Courtyard House — open-plan villa centered around a private courtyard
- L House — L-shaped villa maximizing garden views and natural light
- Deconstructed House — modular villa with interconnected pavilions
- Hill House — elevated villa designed for sloped terrain with panoramic views

## Key Differentiators

- Italian design intelligence meets California's best builders
- Reinforced concrete construction (not wood-frame) for fire and seismic resilience
- Fixed-price, 14-month delivery from briefing to move-in
- Museum-grade concrete finishes inspired by Palazzo Grassi and Kimbell Art Museum
- Bioclimatic engineering by Transsolar for passive cooling and ventilation
- International team of five specialized partners across three continents

## Our Partners

- IT'S Architecture — Italian architectural design (Milan/LA)
- Transsolar KlimaEngineering — climate engineering (Stuttgart)
- BURO MILAN — structural engineering
- DGU — concrete construction and prefabrication
- The Cooperative — LA-based construction management

## Construction Technology

Our double-skin precast wall system consists of:
- Outer layer: fair-faced concrete with oxide pigments (museum finish)
- Middle layer: 100mm continuous thermal insulation
- Inner layer: 55mm reinforced structural concrete core with welded mesh and steel girders
- Total wall thickness: approximately 250mm

This system provides:
- Superior fire resistance (reinforced concrete vs. wood-frame)
- Seismic resilience (monolithic concrete structure)
- Thermal performance (continuous insulation layer)
- Acoustic isolation
- Zero maintenance exterior (concrete ages beautifully)

- Languages: English, Italian
